privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Maven multi-module project creation task for the Eclipse IDE environment. The project creates a parent POM (toolkit-parent) with group ID com.startup.toolkit and version 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT, containing two modules: toolkit-core and toolkit-app. The toolkit-core module implements StringUtils (with capitalize method) and MathUtils (with factorial method). The toolkit-app module depends on toolkit-core and contains a Main class that calls StringUtils.capitalize('hello') and MathUtils.factorial(10). The expected runtime outputs are 'Hello' (capitalized string) and 3628800 (factorial of 10). The project root is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/toolkit-parent. All metadata values are internally consistent and verified against the task description, verifier logic, and setup/export scripts.
